parameters.name: nml
parameters.label: Normals Action
parameters.description: Choose what to do regarding normals.

parameters.name: inputposattrn
parameters.label: Input Position Attribute
parameters.description: Input Position attribute used to calculate normals.

parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: nmlweighting
parameters.label: Normals Weighting
parameters.description: For point normals, choose how to weight the normals of the primitives the point is a part of.

parameters.name: compnmltech
parameters.label: Compute Normals Technique
parameters.description: Specify which technique to use to calculate point normals.

parameters.name: maxprimsperpoint
parameters.label: Max Number of Primitives per Point
parameters.description: Used to allocate temporary storage with the "Loop over Primitives Per " method, it should be set to the maximum number of primitives a point can be a part of in the input geometry.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.label: Angle
parameters.description: For vertex normals, the threshold angle between faces above which the shared edge vertices don't share normals.

parameters.name: outputattrscopen
parameters.label: Normal Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Output attribute scope for the normal.

parameters.name: overrideautoattrn
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: When on, overrides the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: attrtypen
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The normal output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: attrnumcompsn
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: tang
parameters.label: Tangents Action
parameters.description: Sets the tangent operation.

parameters.name: inputposattrt
parameters.label: Input Position Attribute
parameters.description: Input Position attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: inputnormalattr
parameters.label: Input Normal Attribute
parameters.description: Input normal attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: inputtexattrib
parameters.label: Input Texture Coord Attribute
parameters.description: Input texture coordinate attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: comptangtech
parameters.label: Compute Tangents Technique
parameters.description: Specify which technique to use to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: outputattrscopet
parameters.label: Tangent Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Output attribute scope for the tangent.

parameters.name: overrideautoattrt
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: When on, overrides the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: attrtypet
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The tangent attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: attrnumcompst
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attrdefaultvaln3
parameters.label: Attrdefaultvaln3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attrdefaultvalt3
parameters.label: Attrdefaultvalt3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
